revenue.label: Revenue
revenue.note: Reported revenue in USD millions; Grab uses IFRS while peers use U.S. GAAP, and business mix differs.

operating_profit.label: Operating profit (loss)
operating_profit.note: Reported operating income or loss in USD millions; Grab uses IFRS while peers use U.S. GAAP.

net_income.label: Net income (loss)
net_income.note: Reported bottom line under each accounting framework; tax valuation releases and investment revaluations can dominate year-over-year changes.

adjusted_ebitda.label: Adjusted EBITDA
adjusted_ebitda.note: Company-defined non-GAAP measures; definitions are not identical.

operating_cash_flow.label: Operating cash flow
operating_cash_flow.note: Reported cash from operating activities in USD millions; classification follows each company's accounting framework.

free_cash_flow.label: Free cash flow
free_cash_flow.note: Non-GAAP definitions differ. Grab reports Adjusted Free Cash Flow.

platform_volume.label: Platform volume
platform_volume.note: Gross Bookings, Marketplace GOV, GMV, and Grab On-Demand GMV have different inclusions.

activity_count.label: Transactions / rides / orders
activity_count.note: Trips, rides, orders, and gross orders are different activity definitions.

annual_users.label: Annual users
annual_users.note: Only available for selected companies and definitions differ.

loan_portfolio.label: Loans principal outstanding
loan_portfolio.note: Financial-services credit exposure; scope and consolidation differ.
